event: Interior of a shed with hanging nets or scoops
description: The interior of a wooden attic or shed with exposed beams and planks. Dozens of white shell-shaped or scoop-shaped objects hang from the rafters and walls on hooks and strings. More of the same objects are piled on the floor below. A single window at the center of the back wall lets in soft diffused light. The overall palette is warm sepia and brown tones, with the white objects providing contrast against the dark wood.
